title: Reuters Connect Search Result
description: A search response from the Reuters Connect API containing a list of content items matching the search criteria, along with metadata about the total result count and the query that was executed.

results.description: Array of content item summaries matching the search criteria.

totalResults.description: Total number of items matching the search criteria across all pages.

query.description: The search query string that was executed.

itemSummary.description: A summary representation of a content item containing key metadata for display in search results without the full content body.

id.description: The unique identifier for the item, typically in tag URI format.

guid.description: A globally unique identifier for the item regardless of version.

version.description: The version number of this item revision.

headline.description: The headline or title of the content item.

dateCreated.description: The date and time when the item was originally created.

dateModified.description: The date and time when the item was last modified.

channel.description: The alias of the channel this item belongs to.

mediaType.description: The media type of the content.

slug.description: A short keyword slug summarizing the item topic.
